title: Timeout in pods listed as float instead of integer
body:
Documentation for [Pod.stop()](https://podman-py.readthedocs.io/en/latest/podman.domain.pods.html#podman.domain.pods.Pod.stop) lists `timeout` as `Float`. As well as [in the source code](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/v5.4.0.1/podman/domain/pods.py#L8).

However using floats doesn't work: `/stop?t=180.0: schema: error converting value for "t"`

[Podman API reference](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#tag/pods/operation/PodStopLibpod) lists `t` as integer.

comments.body: right, and the unit test seems like it's testing a float and it's passing for some reason. I'll take a look, thanks for the report @moneytoo
